step_rationale: NLRP3 inflammasome product; drives plaque inflammation, endothelial procoagulant expression, and plaque destabilization.
mechanism: Interleukin-1β is a central inflammasome-derived cytokine that orchestrates atherosclerotic plaque inflammation, promotes endothelial dysfunction and procoagulant activation, and accelerates cap degradation in unstable plaques.
